wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: A mobile inspector robot navigates the factory floor scanning inventory. If battery drops below 20%, it must return to charging station. An AMR collector follows to pick up items, all robots maintain safe distance from humans and other robots. If path blocked, robots must find alternative routes within 30 seconds.

constraints: InspectorBot returns to charging when battery below 20%
InspectorBot finishes scanning then the CollectorAMR starts picking itemns
InspectorBot maintains safe distance from humans
InspectorBot maintains safe distance from robots
CollectorAMR maintains safe distance from humans
CollectorAMR maintains safe distance from robots
Inspector find alternative routes within 30 seconds
CollectorAMR find alternative routes within 30 seconds

wrong_samples.constraint: InspectorBot maintains safe distance from robots
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: An assembly robot welds metal frames while a quality inspection drone hovers to scan the joints. The drone can start scanning only after welding is complete. If temperature exceeds 90°C, welding must pause until it drops below 70°C.

WelderBot pauses welding when temperature exceeds 90°C

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: A high-altitude agricultural drone surveys crop zones for moisture and pest indicators. It divides fields into ten sub-zones, capturing spectral data for each. The drone must not descend below 40 meters except for calibration at designated points. If wind speed exceeds 35 km/h, it climbs to safe altitude and hovers until conditions stabilize. When battery capacity falls under 20%, it must return to base within 60 seconds. Eventually, all zones must be scanned and their data transmitted to the control center.

constraints: AgroDrone maintains altitude ≥ 40 m except during calibration
AgroDrone climbs to safe altitude when wind speed > 35 km/h
AgroDrone when wind speed > 35 km/h and AgroDrone is in a safe altitude, it must hover
AgroDrone when hovering, it resumes survey when wind speed ≤ 35 km/h
AgroDrone returns to base within 60 seconds when battery < 20%
Eventually all data transmitted to control center
Eventually AgroDrone must scan all ten sub-zones

wrong_samples.constraint: AgroDrone maintains altitude ≥ 40 m except during calibration
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: An indoor inspection drone autonomously navigates a multi-floor factory. It must spend no more than 120 seconds in each section. If temperature exceeds 60°C, the drone activates thermal protection and skips the current section. In case of lost localization, it switches to mapping mode until position is reacquired. When all sections are inspected, it must land at the maintenance dock and upload sensor logs. It is always possible to reach a safe state where the drone is landed.

constraints: InspectDrone spends ≤ 120 s per section
If temperature exceeds 60°C, InspectDrone must activate thermal protection
InspectDrone skips section when temperature > 60°C
InspectDrone switches to mapping mode if localization lost
InspectDrone lands at maintenance dock after all sections inspected
InspectDrone uploads sensor logs after landing
Always possible to reach safe landed state

wrong_samples.constraint: InspectDrone skips section when temperature > 60°C
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: A mobile manipulator robot performs order picking in a warehouse. It identifies shelves via QR codes and must verify the item before grasping. If weight exceeds its maximum capacity, it must abort the pick and notify the supervisor. When humans are detected within 2 meters, speed is reduced to 0.3 m/s. If obstacle blocking persists longer than 10 seconds, the robot must request assistance. Eventually, all orders should be completed and reported.

constraints: PickerBot verifies item via QR before grasping
PickerBot aborts pick  when load exceeds limit
when load exceeds limit PickerBot notifies supervisor
PickerBot reduces speed to 0.3 m/s when human < 2 m
PickerBot requests help if obstacle persists > 10 s
Eventually all orders completed
Eventually all orders reported

wrong_samples.constraint: PickerBot reduces speed to 0.3 m/s when human < 2 m
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: An autonomous rover explores a volcanic terrain. It collects temperature and seismic data every 200 meters and must not approach closer than 5 meters to lava zones. If terrain slope exceeds 30°, it activates stabilizers before proceeding. If a data packet fails transmission three times, it must log the failure and continue. Eventually, all checkpoints must be reached and at least 90% of data successfully transmitted.

constraints: ExploroRover collects data every 200 m
ExploroRover avoids lava zones by ≥ 5 m
ExploroRover activates stabilizers when slope > 30°
ExploroRover logs transmission failure after 3 retries
ExploroRover fails transmission three times, ExploroRover continues.
ExploroRover must eventually reach all checkpoints.
Eventually ≥ 90% data must be successfully transmitted

wrong_samples.constraint: ExploroRover collects data every 200 m
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: A maintenance bot operates in a refrigerated warehouse maintaining conveyor motors. It must warm up sensors for 30 seconds before measurements. It is always possible for the bot to recover from standby to active operation.
